title: Melancholy Solo Piano
summary: Sparse 60 BPM minor-key piano with delicate harmonies  -  bittersweet and reflective.
prompt: A solo piano piece in a minor key, slow tempo around 60 BPM. Sparse, contemplative melody with held notes and delicate left-hand chords. Sustain pedal washing the harmonies together. Recorded close-miked with natural room reverb. Bittersweet, reflective mood  -  like remembering somewhere far away.
